SERIES_EXACT_ORDER: Refers to the winner of each game in the series in order.
SPEED_OF_X_PITCH_B: All bets will be settled based on the first pitch thrown by the listed starting pitcher. Velocity sourced from baseballsavant.mlb.com.
TEAM_TO_EARN_6_SEED: Market is settled based on which team finishes the season and advances to the playoffs as that league's respective 6 seed, tiebreakers included.
LEAGUE_WINNER: Market refers to the winner of the respective League Championship Series during the MLB Postseason.
WORLD_SERIES_MVP: All bets are action. Other players are available upon request.
EXACT_RESULT: Market is settled based on the Exact Result of the respective series.
NAME_THE_FINALISTS: Market is settled based on the two teams that appear in the respective series.
POSTSEASON_STAT_LEADERS:
Hitters must record a PA and pitcher must appear in a game for action. Other players are available upon request.
Market refers to the leader across all MLB Postseason games and rounds.
MOST_SERIES_HITS: Market refers to the player who will record the most hits in the listed series. Dead Heat Rules will apply to ties. Must record a PA for action.
MOST_SERIES_STRIKEOUTS: Market refers to the pitcher who will record the most strikeouts in the listed series. Dead Heat Rules will apply to ties. Pitcher must appear in a game for action.
PLATE_APPEARANCE_PITCH_COUNT_-_PLAYER_A: Automatic balls/strikes that result from violations will count as pitches. Markets will be void should an intentional walk be issued.
PLATE_APPEARANCE_PITCH_COUNT_-_PLAYER_B: Automatic balls/strikes that result from violations will count as pitches. Markets will be void should an intentional walk be issued.
MOST_SERIES_TOTAL_BASES: Market refers to the player who will record the most total bases in the listed series. Dead Heat Rules will apply to ties. Must record a PA for action.
SERIES_SPECIALS_-_GRAND_SLAM: Market refers to whether a Grand Slam will be hit at any time during the listed series.
SERIES_SPECIALS_-_COMPLETE_GAME: Market refers to whether a Complete Game will be thrown by any single pitcher at any time during the listed series.
PITCHES_PER_PLATE_APPEARANCE: Automatic balls/strikes from violations will count as pitches. Markets will be void if an intentional walk is issued before any pitches are thrown.
PITCHES_PER_PLATE_APPEARANCE_-_ALT: Automatic balls/strikes from violations will count as pitches. Markets will be void if an intentional walk is issued before any pitches are thrown.
PITCHES_PER_PLATE_APPEARANCE_B: Automatic balls/strikes from violations will count as pitches. Markets will be void if an intentional walk is issued before any pitches are thrown.
PITCHES_PER_PLATE_APPEARANCE_-_ALT_B: Automatic balls/strikes from violations will count as pitches. Markets will be void if an intentional walk is issued before any pitches are thrown.
TO_RECORD_A_SAVE: Save markets will be action regardless of whether the listed pitcher(s) appear in the game. Market is settled based on official box score from MLB.com.
TO_RECORD_A_SAVE_B: Market is settled based on official box score from MLB.com
TOTAL_RUNS_SCORE_IN_A_SERIES: Market refers to the total amount of combined runs scored by both teams during the listed series.
TOTAL_COMBINED_HRS_HIT_IN_SERIES: Market refers to the total amount of home runs hit by either team during the listed series.
TOTAL_COMBINED_SERIES_HRS: Market refers to the total amount of home runs hit by either team during the listed series.
PLAYER_TO_HIT_LONGEST_HOME_RUN: Market is settled based on which player hits the longest home run in the listed series. Home Run distances will be sourced from MLB Statcast.
FEWEST_REGULAR_SEASON_WINS: Winning selection will be decided based on winning percentage at the conclusion of the season. In case of tie, Dead Heat rules apply.
TEAM_TO_EARN_1_SEED: Market is based on which team earns the league 1 seed at the completion of the regular season. Official MLB tiebreakers apply; only one winner is possible in each market.
TEAM_TO_EARN_FIRST_ROUND_BYE: The two winning selections in each league will be those teams that receive a bye into the Divisional Round
TO_REACH_LCS: Market is based on which teams reach the respective League Championship Series.
Customers may combine one selection each across the two To Reach LCS markets for a 2-leg parlay.
WORST_RECORD: Winning selection will be decided based on winning percentage at the conclusion of the season. In case of tie, Dead Heat rules apply.
PLAYER_TO_HIT_FIRST_HOME_RUN_OF_THE_SEAS: All bets are action. Other selections available on request.

X_PLATE_APP_-_PLAYER_V: A pitch must be thrown in the plate app. for action.
FIRST_TIME_WINNER: This market refers to whether a franchise will win the World Series for the first time ever.
Franchises without a World Series championship are the Colorado Rockies, San Diego Padres, Milwaukee Brewers, Seattle Mariners, and Tampa Bay Rays.
WINNING_STATE: This market refers to the state in which the World Series champion is located. All 30 teams are included in one of the selections below.
STARTING_PITCHER_DAILY_STRIKEOUT_LEADER: Most strikeouts on the listed day among the pitchers listed. Any listed pitcher that does not start will be voided. Dead Heat Rules will apply to ties.
HIGHEST_SCORING_TEAM: The listed number of games must be played to the 8.5 Innings Rule for bets to be action. If there is a tie for the highest scoring team, Dead Heat rules apply.
HIGHEST_SCORING_GAME: The listed number of games must be played to the 8.5 Innings Rule for bets to be action. If there is a tie for the highest scoring game, Dead Heat rules apply.
LOWEST_SCORING_GAME: The listed number of games must be played to the 8.5 Innings Rule for bets to be action. If there is a tie for the lowest scoring game, Dead Heat rules apply.
LOWEST_SCORING_TEAM: The listed number of games must be played to the 8.5 Innings Rule for bets to be action. If there is a tie for the lowest scoring team, Dead Heat rules apply.
STARTING_PITCHER_COMBINED_ALT_STRIKEOUTS: Both Listed Pitchers must start for bets to stand. Market is settled based on total number of strikeouts starting pitchers accrue within the game.

TEAM_WITH_HIGHEST_SCORING_INNING: For settlement purposes includes extra innings
PLAYER_TO_RECORD_FIRST_RBI: Listed players must record a plate appearance for bets to stand. If a non-listed player is ruled the winner, bets on listed qualified players are action.
If no RBI is recorded, No RBI will be deemed the winner.
METHOD_OF_FIRST_RBI: Listed players must record a plate appearance for bets to stand. If a non-listed player is ruled the winner, bets on listed qualified players are action.
If no RBI is recorded, No RBI will be deemed the winner.
PLAYER_TO_RECORD_FIRST_RUN: Listed players must record a plate appearance for bets to stand. If a non-listed player is ruled the winner, bets on listed qualified players are action.
PLAYERS_TO_COMBINE_FOR_A_HOME_RUN: Both listed players must be included in the starting lineup and record a plate appearance for bets to stand, unless the market is unequivocally determined.
PLAYERS_TO_COMBINE_FOR_2+_HOME_RUNS: Both listed players must be included in the starting lineup and record a plate appearance for bets to stand, unless the market is unequivocally determined.

PLAYERS_TO_COMBINE_FOR_2+_TOTAL_BASES: Total Bases are recorded through hits by the listed players. They do not include walks, HBPs, stolen bases, reach on errors, or fielder's choices.

TEAM_NEXT_LOSS: Games are listed in sequential order of series (e.g. at Nationals Game 1, at Nationals Game 2).
If a series does not occur in that order, then the selection will be void (e.g. a 3-game series is shortened to 2 games, selections on the game not played will be voided).
ALL_STAR_GAME_MVP: Other selections available upon request. For bets to have action, players must record at least one plate appearance and pitchers must face at least one hitter within the All-Star game.
WILL_THE_MLB_ALL-STAR_GAME_BE_DECIDED_BY: A Tie Break Home Run Derby occurs if the game is tied after 9 innings.
HIGHEST_EXIT_VELOCITY: If unlisted selection wins, then all bets void.
ALL_STAR_SWING_OFF_SPECIALS: All selections in this market only pertain to a potential Tiebreaker Swing-Off in the 2025 MLB All-Star Game. Any player listed who does not participate in the Swing-Off will be Void.
GAME_SPECIALS_-_POPULAR: For selections that list individual hitters, all must be listed in the starting lineup and record 1+ plate appearance for action, unless the market is unequivocally determined.
PLAYER_TO_HIT_A_HOME_RUN_IN_FIRST_PLATE_: Parlay up to 4 selections in the same game.
VELOCITY_OF_FIRST_PITCH_PREMATCH: All bets will be settled based on the first pitch thrown by the listed starting pitcher. Velocity sourced from baseballsavant.mlb.com.
ANY_PLAYER_TO_HIT_A_HOME_RUN_X+_FEET: If no home run is hit, all bets remain action.
STRIKEZONE_PARLAY_A:
Predict the pitch.
Each outcome is based on three factors:
Zone (In/Out) — any part of the ball in the strike zone per MLB.com = “In.”
Swing (Yes/No) — based on official MLB.com pitch result tags.
In-Play (Yes/No) — “Yes” if the ball’s put in play
Settled using official MLB.com Statcast data. No-pitch events void.
